data.title: Binance Launches KernelDAO (KERNEL) Simple Earn Promotions
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced two promotional offerings for KernelDAO (KERNEL) through its Simple Earn Flexible and Locked Products. During the promotion period, users subscribing to KERNEL Simple Earn Products can benefit from a 10% Bonus Tiered Annual Percentage Rate (APR) on Flexible Products and up to 29.9% APR on Locked Products.

The subscription operates on a first-come, first-served basis, with specific minimum and maximum subscription limits impacting the APR. Bonus Tiered APR rewards are distributed daily to users' Spot Accounts, starting the day after accrual begins, which is two days post-subscription. Real-Time APR is accrued and added to users' Earn Accounts every minute, while Locked Products APR is also distributed daily, following the same timeline.

The promotion period for KERNEL Flexible Products runs from 2025-11-27 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-31 23:59 (UTC), with a minimum subscription limit of 0.1 KERNEL and a maximum of 1.4 million KERNEL. The APR during this period ranges from 7% to 17%, depending on the tier. For Locked Products, the promotion spans from 2025-11-27 10:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-27 09:59 (UTC), with varying durations of 30, 60, and 90 days, offering APRs of 21.9%, 25.9%, and 29.9%, respectively.

Users can participate by purchasing KERNEL on the Spot Market or through the Buy Crypto page, which supports various payment methods. They can then subscribe to the desired KERNEL Simple Earn Product to start earning rewards. Binance emphasizes that only users who complete identity verification during the promotion period are eligible for rewards, and sub-accounts do not qualify for Bonus Tiered APR rewards. Changes to the Binance Simple Earn Rewards Rate will be communicated on the platform as needed.

data.title: XRP ETF Debut Sparks Heavy Accumulation and a Bullish Technical Setup
data.description:
XRP’s first wave of U. S. -listed spot ETFs is off to a powerful start, pulling in close to 80 million XRP on their opening day and quickly lifting total assets under management to $778 million, according to XRP Insights.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/xrp-etf-debut-sparks-heavy-accumulation-and-a-bullish-technical-setup/

data.title: Terraform Labs Co-Founder Do Kwon Faces Sentencing in TerraUSD Fraud Case
data.description: According to Odaily, Terraform Labs co-founder Do Kwon has stated that his sentence in the United States for involvement in the 2022 TerraUSD stablecoin collapse, which amounted to approximately $40 billion, should not exceed five years. Kwon admitted to charges of conspiracy and wire fraud in August, thereby avoiding a trial. Last year, he was arrested and convicted in Montenegro for using a fake passport and was subsequently extradited to the U.S. as a wanted individual from South Korea.

data.title: Ark Invest has increased its holdings in Coinbase, betting on a "substantial reversal" in inflation.
data.description: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest continued to increase its holdings in crypto-related stocks on Wednesday, purchasing approximately $16.47 million worth of Coinbase stock, totaling 62,166 shares, distributed across three funds: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF. Coinbase is currently ARKK's fifth largest holding, with a total value of approximately $392 million and a weighting of 5.2%. Affected by the recent pullback, Coinbase's stock price has fallen 26.7% over the past month. Ark also increased its holdings in the Ark-21Shares Bitcoin ETF, purchasing 39,400 units (approximately $1.17 million). Ark has recently been accumulating exposure to crypto stocks such as Coinbase, BitMine, Bullish, Circle, and Robinhood, aiming to capitalize on the sector's recent significant correction. Cathie Wood stated on X that the current liquidity squeeze weighing on the crypto and AI sectors is expected to reverse in the coming weeks, based on three points: 1. The Federal Reserve may end quantitative tightening (QT) at its December 10 meeting; 2. Market liquidity will gradually return as the US government shutdown is resolved; 3. The Federal Reserve may cut interest rates again next month. In a previous webinar, Wood stated that the 10-year Treasury yield has already reflected a "significant decline" in inflation over the past month, and pointed out that "deflationary forces" in the technology sector are strengthening. "After the tariff impact is digested next year, we wouldn't be surprised to see a real breakthrough in inflation." (The Block)

data.title: Binance HODLer airdrops APRO (AT), trading begins November 27th.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will list APRO (AT) on November 27, 2025 at 22:00 (Beijing time), and open trading pairs AT/USDT, AT/USDC, AT/BNB, and AT/TRY. Users who subscribe to BNB in ​​Earn products between 08:00 on November 4, 2025 and 07:59 on November 7, 2025 (Beijing time) will receive AT airdrop rewards. Airdrop information is expected to be announced within 24 hours, and the new tokens will be distributed to spot wallets at least one hour before trading begins. (This news item was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Do Kwon argues his sentence in the TerraUSD crash should not exceed five years.
data.description: Do Kwon, co-founder of Terraform Labs, stated that his sentence in the United States for his involvement in the approximately $40 billion TerraUSD stablecoin collapse fraud in 2022 should not exceed five years. Kwon pleaded guilty in August to conspiracy and wire fraud charges, thus avoiding trial. He was arrested and convicted last year in Montenegro for using a fake passport and was subsequently extradited to the United States as a fugitive from South Korea. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Reenters ETH Market, Fires Off A $44-M Long
data.description:
A prominent crypto trader has made a bold move back into Ethereum, stirring attention across digital markets. Reports have disclosed that the account known as “1011short” converted 10 million USDC into Hyperliquid before opening a long position with a five-fold leverage, controlling around $44. 15 million in ETH. Related Reading: Bitcoin Faces More Downside After Recent Crash, Data Shows Whale Opens A Massive Ethereum Bet The trade uses 15,000 ETH at an entry price of $2,945, while current market levels sit near $2,896
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/bitcoin-whale-reenters-eth-market-fires-off-a-44-m-long/

data.title: Several Solana ecosystem tokens within Upbit experienced a short-term surge, with Orca rising by over 100%.
data.description: Following the Upbit theft, several Solana blockchain tokens on the Upbit platform experienced a brief surge, with Orca rising by 104%, io.net by 74%, and Meteora by 62%. Previous reports indicated that Upbit suspended deposits and withdrawals due to the theft of $36.8 million worth of Solana network assets.
